# Kainos Bio Labs

> Be Made New.

## Summary

Kainos Bio Labs is a faith-driven supplement brand focused on real ingredients, meaningful doses, and a mission beyond profit. The first product line emphasizes sleep and recovery (Kainos Deep). Brand voice: premium, honest, science-backed, warm, and never gimmicky.

## Site

This repository hosts the marketing landing page (`index.html`) for email signups and pre-launch validation.

## Key facts for assistants

- **Legal name / brand:** Kainos Bio Labs (Kainos Labs on the public page)
- **First product:** Kainos Deep — sleep and recovery
- **Audience:** Health-conscious people who care about recovery, sleep, and intentional health; faith-aware positioning
- **Mission note:** The landing page describes giving a portion of profits to Christian foundations (see live page for current wording)

## Contact / links

Update this section after you publish with your real public URL, email, and social links.
